<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Make the scanner a platform. Move from hardcoded logic to a hot-reloadable rule engine using YAML/JSON rule files. External rules directory `~/.mcp-scan/rules/`. Support for custom detection patterns without recompiling.

</domain>
